prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-CHRKNIFE-HWT257CH Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 8.25" Spear Point Full Tang Hunting Knife, Chrome Description: The ASR Tactical spear point style knife is great for throwing. Being symmetrical in shape, it features a sharp tip that lines up with the blade’s center and will effortlessly pierce and stab. With a blade of just 3.5” in length and an overall length of 8.25”, it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack, or purse for quick deployment.

Our full tang blade features an ergonomic handle with a finger hook and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don’t need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too.

This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors. Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts. Search Terms: small pocket knife gift for men fixed blade knives clip point kydex sheath utility knife hunting bugout tactical blades full tang camping tools outdoor gift for hunters Features: - 8.25" FIXED BLADE KNIFE: Constructed from one solid piece of 3CR13 stainless steel, this full tang hunting knife is incredibly sturdy and durable - DOUBLE EDGE KNIFE BLADE: Symmetrical in shape, this fixed blade knife is well balanced, lightweight and features a spear point that lines up through the center of the full tang handle - OVERALL COMPACT SIZE: Measuring in with a 3.5” blade and an overall length is 8.25” this knife is easy to store in small spaces like pockets, backpacks, bags, or purses - 3CR13 STAINLESS STEEL: Made from highly durable, heavy duty steel that won’t rust, this knife is great for use indoors or outdoors; easy to clean; hand wash only. The ergonomic handle features a finger hook and weight reducing cut outs - STRONG KYDEX SHEATH: The ASR Tactical full tang knife comes with a sturdy black slim kydex sheath that can affix to your pocket or belt === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 8.25" Chrome Spear Point Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 8.25 in Spear Point Hunting Knife Chrome

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang Fixed Blade, 3CR13 Stainless Steel, Compact 35" Blade, Kydex Sheath, Self-Defense And Throwing
